text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... Phew!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah! It's almost time!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
The Mile Championship is finally, finally here! I
finally get to race against Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(I've been waiting for this day ever since I first
heard about Oguri! Or wait...)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: (Maybe I've been waiting since even before that! Huh, when did I start looking forward to today anyway? Eh, who cares!)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: All right! I'm gonna make this the best race ever!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(This is gonna be a race like no one's ever seen
before! It'll seriously be the red-hot battle, just
like...)

text_block_list.name: Young Bamboo
text_block_list.text:
And then what happened?! How'd you take on
your rival, Dad?!

text_block_list.name: Young Bamboo
text_block_list.text: I wanna hear more about your fiery battle!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo's Father
text_block_list.text:
Sure thing! Now, there I was, face-to-face with my
rival...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(I want people to talk about this race with that
same look in their eyes Dad had!)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(I want people to watch and get inspired to follow
their own dreams!)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's the kinda hot-blooded, passionate race I'm
gonna deliver!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
I'm so excited to find out who the real Ruler of
the Mile is between Oguri Cap and Bamboo
Memory!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: I am too, but let's be real. Oguri's definitely the strongest even when it comes to miles! This is her era, after all.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Can't argue with you there. Just look at her! She's
in perfect shape today. She's got it in the bag!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Today, we find out whether Bamboo's dream
shines bright enough to redefine the generation.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes. And as part of that generation, we must bear
witness.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: You can do it, Bamboo! We're all rooting for you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It just hit me that my dream is waiting for me out
there... It's kind of a weird feeling.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: And... there's something I have to tell you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You've always believed in my dream and me.
Your guidance is what has let me to this point.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: THANK YOU FOR EVERYTHING!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Now, my rival and I are going to put on a race so
amazing that it lives on in the hearts of everyone
who sees it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Today, my dream comes true!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: BUUUURN BRIGHT!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: All right! Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oguri! Are you ready to bring the HEAT?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yup. Let's have a great race.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Heck yeah!
